PowerShell($b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\Gabriel Ti\\Downloads\\LP - Dá vó do João\\Fontes\\Gelato.OTF"\)\); $rule = "@font-face { font-family:'Gelato Luxe'; src:url\('data:font/opentype;base64," + $b64 + "'\) format\('opentype'\); font-weight: 100 900; }"; $html = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\Users\\Gabriel Ti\\Downloads\\LP - Dá vó do João\\index.html", [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $old = "@font-face { font-family:'Gelato Luxe'; src:url\('Fontes/Gelato.OTF'\) format\('opentype'\); font-weight: 100 900; }"; $new = $html.Replace\($old, $rule\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\Users\\Gabriel Ti\\Downloads\\LP - Dá vó do João\\index.html", $new, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); "Done")
